title: Fireworkey
description: FireRocketKey is a small Fabric mod that lets you launch a firework rocket with a single key press, with full configuration for delay and cooldown.
body:
Features:
Fires a firework with one key press

Automatically switches to a firework in your hotbar

Optionally switches back to your previous item

Configurable delay and cooldown

Simple in-game commands for setup

Disclaimer:
  Using this mod on some servers may getting you banned
  Check the server rules before using it
